query:
_index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory = "sourcehost_and_tier_volume"
| parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
| json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as sourceHost, dataTier, bytes, count
|where dataTier matches "{{Tier}}"
| bytes/1Gi as gbytes 
| sum(gbytes) as gbytes by sourceHost
| round(gbytes,2) as gbytes
| ((queryEndTime() - queryStartTime())/(1000*60*60*24)) as duration_in_day
| gbytes / duration_in_day as %"GB/Day"
| round(%"GB/Day",2) as %"GB/Day"
| top 5 sourceHost by gbytes, %"GB/Day"

sources.dashboardName: Data Volume - Logs by Metadata Fields
sources.dashboardDescription: The Data Volume - Logs by Metadata Fields dashboard allows you to view log ingest volume by tier, source categories, collectors and hosts.
